title: PSI Candidate Information Bulletin — Oregon Construction Contractors
description: Official PSI exam blueprint covering format, content areas, and passing criteria for the Oregon CCB exam.

title: Oregon CCB Pre-License Education Requirements
description: Official CCB page describing the 16-hour pre-license training requirement.

title: ORS Chapter 701 — Construction Contractors
description: Oregon Revised Statutes governing construction contractor licensing, bonds, and enforcement.

title: ORS 701.305 — Written Contract Requirements for Residential Contractors
description: Oregon statute specifying when a written contract is required for residential construction work and what it must contain, including the CCB license number, price, dates, and right-of-rescission notice.

title: ORS 701.310 — Additional Contract Disclosures
description: Oregon statute detailing required bond and insurance disclosures that must appear in residential construction contracts.

title: OAR 812-009 — CCB Administrative Rules: Licensing and Conduct
description: Oregon Administrative Rules promulgated by the CCB governing contractor conduct, complaint procedures, and enforcement actions.

title: ORS 701.068 — Surety Bond Requirement
description: Oregon statute requiring licensed contractors to file and maintain a surety bond and describing bond claims and suspension triggers.

title: ORS 701.073 — General Liability Insurance Requirement
description: Oregon statute requiring general liability insurance for licensed contractors and setting baseline coverage obligations.

title: ORS 701.081 — Residential Contractor Bond and Insurance Amounts
description: Oregon statute setting residential endorsement-level surety bond and liability insurance minimums.

title: ORS 701.084 — Commercial Contractor Bond and Insurance Amounts
description: Oregon statute setting commercial endorsement-level surety bond and liability insurance minimums.

title: OAR 812-003-0142 — License Fees
description: CCB administrative rule establishing new, renewal, and reissue license fee amounts and effective dates.

title: OAR 812-003-0200 — Insurance Requirements
description: CCB administrative rule specifying insurer ratings, policy conditions, and compliance requirements for contractor general liability insurance.

title: OAR 812-003-0221 — Insurance Amounts
description: CCB administrative rule listing required liability insurance amounts by endorsement.

title: OAR 812-003-0260 — License Application Information
description: CCB administrative rule listing information and declarations required on license applications.

title: Oregon CCB — Guide to Becoming a Licensed Contractor
description: Official CCB guide describing endorsement choices, bond/insurance amounts, and licensing process details.

title: NASCLA Contractors Guide to Business, Law and Project Management (Oregon), 2nd Edition
description: Primary exam-prep textbook referenced by PSI; provides detailed explanations for financial statements, cash flow, and job-cost controls.
